summary: iter174 comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 26/26 passed (100%). Frontend: All renamed panels render correctly. Alice→Relay rename verified. Promotions endpoint working. SSRF guard functional.
test_credentials: ADMIN_API_TOKEN from backend/.env used for admin-gated endpoints (promotions, people upsert).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed employees and tickets for verification. Playwright created test tickets with RLY- prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter174 delivered: (1) Alice→Relay rename complete - all /api/alice/* return 404, /api/relay/* working with RLY- ticket prefix. (2) Promotions endpoint /api/people/promotion creates promotion_history entries and updates employee title. (3) SSRF guard on recipe_import.py blocks localhost, 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254. (4) Standup autofill includes promotions in people_services section. (5) UI labels renamed per NAMING_AUDIT.md - 'Local Guide' (was FOH Concierge Hub), 'Concierge Desk' (was Echo Concierge), 'Relay · Tickets' (was Alice · Tickets). (6) Command bar search for 'Alice' returns 0 results, 'Relay' returns correct suggestion.
